```python
def backtracking(current_vertex_index: int, vertices_list: List[Vertex], colored_vertices: Dict[Vertex, Color]) -> bool:
    if current_vertex_index != -1 and isThereColorConflict(vertices_list[current_vertex_index], colored_vertices):
        return False

    if current_vertex_index == len(vertices_list) - 1:
        return True

    next = current_vertex_index + 1
    next_vertex = vertices_list[next]
    for color in colors:
        colored_vertices[next_vertex] = color
        isDone = backtracking(next, vertices_list, colored_vertices)
        if isDone:
            return True
    
    del colored_vertices[next_vertex]
    return False
```
